name: sergeant-reviewer
description: Sergeant open-source engineering reviewer for VS Code.

viewsWelcome.contents: Open the Sergeant Command Center to review, verify, and inspect this workspace.

sergeant.pythonPath.description: Python executable used to run Sergeant.

sergeant.provider.description: Legacy display preference. Cpl is Sergeant's council-led Corporal Specialist; models and gateways are replaceable engines beneath it.

enumDescriptions: Deploy Cpl by default and fall back to deterministic Sergeant evidence when no route is available.
Require Cpl reasoning before Sergeant can approve.
Disable Cpl reasoning and use deterministic review only.
Let Cpl discover its local gateway, Ollama, or LM Studio and select the strongest available models.
Use the Sergeant-native Cpl local gateway.
Use Ollama as one engine beneath Cpl.
Use LM Studio as one engine beneath Cpl.
Use the explicitly configured endpoint as one engine beneath Cpl.

sergeant.llmBaseUrl.description: Explicit OpenAI-compatible endpoint beneath Cpl. Remote endpoints are never auto-discovered; credentials remain in SERGEANT_CPL_API_KEY or the legacy SERGEANT_LLM_API_KEY.

sergeant.llmModel.description: Optional primary model slug. Blank lets Cpl form its council from the strongest available models and specialist assignments.

sergeant.llmProtocol.description: Transport protocol beneath Cpl. The local Cpl gateway uses OpenAI Responses; generic engines commonly use Chat Completions.

enumDescriptions: Cpl deploys the smallest sufficient council and adds members only for named evidence gaps.
Cpl starts with deeper specialist coverage and allows more council rounds.
Cpl deploys every specialist and the largest bounded council.
Run one Cpl generalist council member only.
Legacy alias for maximum council deployment.

sergeant.cplMaxRounds.description: Maximum evidence → officer report → council rebrief rounds before unresolved gaps are returned to Sergeant.

sergeant.cplMaxCouncilMembers.description: Maximum distinct model council members Cpl may recruit for one mission.
